entries.title: Kepler-Zeit-Leiter: diskretes Delta-M-Linienspektrum auf Floquet-Attraktoren
entries.scope: 500 Schritte, Tail=64, soft+ring2, 8 zyklische Operatoren; Floquet-Channel-Alignment [B/C] via summarize_annotated_delta_m; Reproducible numerical alignment diagnostics compare observed ΔM tails with the formal 2×4 χ-lift annotation. The report does not claim that ΔM values generate or determine the channel projection.
entries.metric_or_result: baseline unique_dM=2, M_period=8, Spektrum ±1.85619; pi/2 unique_dM=3; Stoerung unique_dM=1; baseline max lift-sheet abs diff ≈3.71

entries.title: Riemann-Resonanz via S(Delta_M)=mean cos(gamma*Delta_M) — Schnittstellen-Kosinus-Mittelung
entries.scope: volle Stichprobe N=2_001_052 Riemann-Nullstellen; pytest-Gesamtsuite 127 passed (1 skipped)
entries.metric_or_result: Verdict: refuted. S(±1.85619)≈2.6e-7, var≈0.500, nicht resonant; S(0)=1.0 trivial; identisch zum Zufalls-Nullmodell; destruktive Interferenz, kein Baseline-Ueberhang

entries.title: Riemann-Skalen-Interferenz via S(x_0)=mean cos(gamma*log(a/a_0)) — Skalen-Kosinus-Mittelung
entries.scope: korrigierte explizite-Formel-Metrik; volle Stichprobe N=2_001_052
entries.metric_or_result: Verdict: open_hypothesis / experimental. Tail-x_0 in {0,-0.5}; S(0)=1.0 trivial; S(-0.5)≈-1.8e-6, nicht resonant; negative Evidenz ohne statistisch signifikantes Signal — keine formale Widerlegung der strukturellen Kopplung

entries.title: Signierte Shell-Syndrome als kanonische Verfeinerung

entries.metric_or_result: upgrade_status=upgraded_from_pre; validated_by=E-042; separation_failures_under_G_model=0; defensive_scope ohne Kausalbehauptung
entries.defensive_scope: No causal identification of pumping/fixpoint/bifurcation; only a canonical, symmetry-invariant refined signature separation.

entries.title: E-043-pre: Coupled Shell Resonance Graph
entries.scope: Keil A-pre; paarweise/dreifach gekoppelte N=4,6,8 auf 6 x0-Niveaus; Resonanzgraph-Invarianten
entries.metric_or_result: single_operator_profiles + coupled N4_N6/N4_N8/N6_N8/N4_N6_N8; graph_invariants fixed_points/cycles/pump_paths; N6 bifurcation nodes
entries.defensive_scope: No astrophysical identification; finite coupled-shell dynamics only.

entries.title: Five-qubit stabilizer bridge [[5,1,3]]
entries.scope: symplektische Projektion 112 dyadischer Wurzeln auf 15 nichttriviale [[5,1,3]]-Stabilisatoren; strukturelles Interface, keine physikalische Identifikation
entries.metric_or_result: 15/15 Stabilisatoren; 1680=112x15 Paare; 784/1680=7/15 commutation_signum=+1; 49 symplektische Wurzelklassen; Shell-Kommutationsquote entartet fuer N=4/6/8
entries.defensive_scope: Complete finite stabilizer interface, but not a separating invariant for shell proxies N=4,6,8; separation remains in E-037 associative_ratio.
entries.negative_result: Scalar commutation quota 7/15 identical for N=4, N=6, N=8

entries.title: E-045-pre: Signed [[5,1,3]] stabilizer support profile
entries.scope: v_N in {±1}^15 for N=4,6,8; G_5-code before comparison; tests scalar 7/15 degeneration in full signed profile
entries.metric_or_result: positive_count=7/15 preserved; raw profiles distinct; orbit classes equal under G_5-code (|G|=20); e045_upgrade_eligible=false
entries.defensive_scope: No classification theorem; scalar E-044 negative result preserved; signed orbit classes do not separate N=4,6,8 under G_5-code.

entries.title: EABC/Floquet phase distribution for twin-prime candidates (n ≡ 11 mod 12)
entries.scope: CE twin-prime candidate generation for n ≡ 11 mod 12; annotate candidates by fixed EABC/Floquet phase using candidate_index mod 8; small-sieve baseline and true twin-prime hit counting; hit-rate distributions by floquet step, channel, chi phase, and sheet; phase-shift null summaries and exploratory best-phase diagnostics; explicit non-predictive governance
entries.metric_or_result: 9654 sieved candidates, 4122 twin hits at X=10^6, B=97; chi²=2.63, p=0.917, uniformity not rejected (α=0.05); max hit-rate spread 0.024 across 8 phases; exploratory max enrichment 1.03 at phase A (post-hoc [C])
entries.not_claimed: No proof of twin primes, no held-out confirmation of any phase rule, and no optimized selector
